title: huggingface/transformers
summary: Hugging Face Transformers provides a unified API for state-of-the-art pretrained models across text, vision, audio, and multimodal tasks, supporting both inference and training.
chinese_summary: Hugging Face Transformers 提供统一的API，支持文本、视觉、音频和多模态任务的最先进预训练模型，涵盖推理和训练。
